text.tspan: Share of paints with lead levels greater than 10,000 ppm, 2021
Lead paint is thought to be a significant contributor to lead poisoning; many countries have therefore
implemented a regulatory limit of 90 parts per million (ppm) or 600ppm per weight of dry paint.
Data source: International Pollutants Elimination Network (IPEN)
